  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    share/sgml           commercial.hardware.xml 
  Log:
  PR:     www/151642
  
  Add Acnodes Corporation to the list of hardware providers with FreeBSD support:
  
  Acnodes Corporation provides FreeBSD and Linux-based computer for customers
  in the industrial control, automation industries, and for the military.
  
  Requested by:   tony att acnodes dott com
